counterClaimFeeCostParagraph: cyBased on the information provided, it will cost the defendant {{counterClaimFee, currency(currency: GBP; trailingZeroDisplay: stripIfInteger)}} to make your counterclaim.
counterClaimFeeHelpParagraph: cyThe defendant may be able to get help paying the fee if they (one or more of the following):
counterClaimFeeHeading2: cyDoes the defendant need help paying the counterclaim fee?

counterClaimFeeOptions.iNeedHelpWithPayingFee: cyThe defendant needs help paying the fee
counterClaimFeeOptions.iDoNotNeedHelpWithPayingFee: cyThe defendant does not need help paying the fee

counterClaimFee.required: cySelect if the defendant needs help paying the counterclaim fee
